hypothesis: Combining EMA crossovers with Bollinger expansion and Volume Oscillator confirmation creates a robust momentum entry signal that filters out weak trends. The ATR-based dynamic stop-loss and trailing take-profit based on Bollinger bands improve risk-reward profiles and reduce drawdowns.

Combining EMA crossovers with Bollinger expansion and Volume Oscillator confirmation creates a robust momentum entry signal that filters out weak trends. The ATR-based dynamic stop-loss and take-profit with Bollinger band adjustments ensures proper risk management while capitalizing on volatility expansion.
